width.$description: PRODUCT-SCOPE — NOT PUBLISHED to the shared rare-tokens package. Fluid width of the hero chat-preview card (and its two-column grid track): 540px max above the medium breakpoint (~1024px), scaling down to a 420px floor through the medium band; capped to 100% on the narrowest phones. The 52.8vw term is calibrated against THIS page's full-width hero panel and resolves against the viewport, not the parent — inside any narrower container (sidebar, modal, split pane) it computes a wrong width. Kept in lockstep with chat-preview.font (30x ratio) so the card zooms as one unit.

font.$description: PRODUCT-SCOPE — NOT PUBLISHED to the shared rare-tokens package. Master font size for the chat card: 18px above the medium breakpoint (~1024px), scaling to a 14px floor through the medium band. The card text inherits this, so text and width shrink together for a cohesive resize. The 1.76vw term is viewport-relative and page-calibrated; it is only correct in this page's hero context.
